description: Clip to [p1, p99] per channel, scale to [0,1]
Split each image into 3x4 grid of tiles
Mean across sites within each well
Soft k-means on plate labels at well level
Median across replicate wells per compound
Drop one of each pair with |r| > 0.95
Row-wise L2 norm to unit sphere
effect: Cosine distance = Euclidean on unit sphere
